summary: Traceability Module ARS 1000-2 (Clauses 11-16) - Complete Testing. All 24 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend pages and interactions verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend traceability.py is well-structured with proper Pydantic models and MongoDB serialization
All 7 etapes (recolte, fermentation, sechage, stockage_coop, conditionnement, transport, export) properly implemented
Segregation check correctly blocks mixing certified and non-certified lots
QR code generation uses qrcode library with proper base64 encoding
PDF export uses reportlab with proper styling and table formatting
Excel export uses openpyxl with proper headers and formatting
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
QuickActionsPanel correctly includes Tracabilite section with 5 items
seed_data_creation: Created test lot LOT-A9B28782 with fermentation event during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Traceability module fully tested. 3 lots exist in DB: LOT-A9B28782 (TEST Producteur Tracabilite, certifie, fermentation), LOT-F6D9B92F (Yao Tanoh, non-certifie, recolte), LOT-D29F82F8 (Koffi Kouame, certifie, fermentation). Segregation check between certified and non-certified lots correctly returns blocked=true.
